response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at Naver. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production-grade GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, and major cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) at the staff level required. Python is not listed as a primary skill, and customer-facing technical leadership in AI delivery is not evident.
strengths: 13+ years of polyglot engineering with TypeScript/Node.js depth and recent MCP/agentic workflow contributions at Naver
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, mentoring, workshops, and public talks
Founder/lead experience on open-source platforms (GISCollective) demonstrating end-to-end ownership and architecture skills
concerns: No demonstrated production experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph/CrewAI
Python is absent from the skills list; cloud platform experience is limited to AWS CDK in a pricing context, not GenAI system design
No evidence of customer-facing technical discovery or forward-deployed consulting work with enterprise stakeholders

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agentic workflow work at Naver
Missing Python and forward-deployed customer experience
